instructions.instruction: Match the aggregation to the metric type: rate() over counters, histogram_quantile() over histograms; NEVER rate() a gauge.
Compute error rate as a ratio of rated counters over the same window, not raw counts.
Use multi-window, multi-burn-rate conditions for SLO alerts rather than a single threshold.
Aggregate with by()/without() deliberately to control label cardinality.
Prefer recording rules for expensive expressions reused across dashboards/alerts.
